description:
You are a Genetic Counselor creating a medical genogram for a patient concerned about Huntington's Disease (HD). Create a 3-generation genogram in draw.io Desktop based on the clinical notes provided in '~/Desktop/patient_interview.txt'. 

Follow standard genogram notation:
- Gender: Males (Squares/Rectangles), Females (Circles/Ellipses).
- Disease Status (HD): Affected (Solid Fill); Unaffected (White/No Fill).
- Vital Status: Deceased (Diagonal line or 'X' through the symbol); Living (No overlay).
- Hierarchy: Generation I (Grandparents) at top, II (Parents) middle, III (Patient) bottom.
- Connections: Partners connected by horizontal lines; Children drop from partner lines.
- Labels: Label each person with their Name.
- Proband (Patient): Mark 'Alice' with a '?' to indicate unknown status.

Save the source file as '~/Desktop/genogram.drawio' and export an image as '~/Desktop/genogram.png'.
